description:
As a solar performance engineer, estimate the 2023 energy yield of a 10 MW PV plant using on-site ground-measured data from /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/raw_logger_data_2023.csv and compare it against the bankable P50 expectation from a standard satellite-based TMY weather file for Phoenix, AZ. 

The on-site dataset (Lat: 33.45, Lon: -112.05, Elev: 330m, TZ: -7) contains GHI, DNI, DHI, air temperature, and wind speed. Use PySAM Pvwattsv8 for both simulations with the following system configuration: 10,000 kW DC capacity, 1.2 DC:AC ratio, Array Type 0 (Fixed open rack), 25-degree tilt, 180-degree azimuth, and 14.08% system losses. 

Calculate the annual energy yield for both the 2023 logger data and the TMY resource, as well as the percentage difference between them. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/weather_comparison_results.json including the fields: tmy_annual_energy_kwh, logger_2023_annual_energy_kwh, yield_difference_percent, and system_capacity_kw.
